    keyOWm6L_QIbkWDCvbjtE-Wsw
    descriptionBring the Bug Legs to Xhargreg in Zergelin.
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Why hello there! Look at all those Bug Leg! That’s the best gift anyone could ever wish for!!! Oh? You want my help? .. wait.. what have you got there? Eeep! Oh.. phew… it’s dead… It’s been a long long time since I saw another one of my species.. although not long enough.. hahahharghga....” *Xhargreg pokes the corpse with a bug leg* Xhargreg: ”You say they have appeared in Fulzar? That’s terrible news! *Sob* All our poor bug friends are in danger now! I must check on my poor wasp! *Xhargreg rushes off* Report back to Operative Smith in Fulzar.
    addedBodies["8UX4ujQOAkChwhxVLE1ubw"]
